query:
-- Full Aus Ships customer record
SELECT * FROM customers WHERE externalId = 'C7513';

-- Check if there's a Xero contact name stored for this customer
SELECT DISTINCT contactName FROM billing_items 
WHERE contactName LIKE '%Ship%' OR contactName LIKE '%Aus S%';

-- Check unmatched billing items that might belong to Aus Ships
SELECT bi.contactName, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.invoiceDate, bi.matchStatus
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.matchStatus = 'unmatched'
  AND (bi.billingPlatform = '' OR bi.billingPlatform IS NULL)
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 15;

-- Full Aus Ships customer record
SELECT * FROM customers WHERE externalId = 'C7513';

-- Check if there's a Xero contact name stored for this customer
SELECT DISTINCT contactName FROM billing_items 
WHERE contactName LIKE '%Ship%' OR contactName LIKE '%Aus S%';

-- Check unmatched billing items that might belong to Aus Ships
SELECT bi.contactName, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.invoiceDate, bi.matchStatus
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.matchStatus = 'unmatched'
  AND (bi.billingPlatform = '' OR bi.billingPlatform IS NULL)
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 15;
